scripts.dev: npm run build -w @wejoy/domain && concurrently -k -n node,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @wejoy/node" "npm run dev -w @wejoy/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @wejoy/domain && npm run build -w @wejoy/web && npm run build -w @wejoy/node
scripts.test: npm run test -w @wejoy/domain && npm run test -w @wejoy/node
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @wejoy/domain && npm run typecheck -w @wejoy/web && npm run typecheck -w @wejoy/node
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
